blocks.heading: A Restored Wonder Returns to Bloom
blocks.body: The Nocturne Orchid arrives with a once-lost provenance, restored for a single-night donor preview.

blocks.heading: Preview Note
blocks.body: Please review the updated provenance binder at the display pedestal before entering the Moonbridge sequence.

items: Revised provenance packet approved by donor relations.
Sponsor recognition to follow the blackout rehearsal.
Collection story condensed for donor-facing presentation.

items.title: Restoration Story
items.body: Frames the orchid as a recovered and stabilized icon piece.

items.title: Sponsor Credits
items.body: Presentation copy and donor packet managed through Daria Pell’s office.
